title: The statistic value of temporary data size always increases
description: ### Company or project name _No response_ ### Describe what's wrong The statistic value of temporary data size only increase but not reduce: https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/blob/09e4d7cdb763d263820386b0ee96882ac3c7d8db/src/Interpreters/TemporaryDataOnDisk.h#L79 https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/blob/09e4d7cdb763d263820386b0ee96882ac3c7d8db/src/Interpreters/TemporaryDataOnDisk.cpp#L460-L479 So when max_temporary_data_on_disk_size is set, the statistic value of temporary data size will increase and finally reach the limit size, However, the real data size in disk is not reach the max_temporary_data_on_disk_size. ### Does it reproduce on the most recent release? Yes ### How to reproduce Set max_temporary_data_on_disk_size to a small size(Such as 10240). create a table ``` CREATE TABLE default.t_proj_external ( `k1` UInt32, `k2` UInt32, `k3` UInt32, `value` UInt32 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple() SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192; INSERT INTO t_proj_external SELECT 1, number%2, number%4, number FROM numbers(50000); ``` Multiple run the sql(about 4 times) ``` SELECT k1, k2, k3, sum(value) v FROM t_proj_external GROUP BY k1, k2, k3 ORDER BY k1, k2, k3 SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 0, max_bytes_before_external_group_by = 1, max_bytes_ratio_before_external_group_by = 0, group_by_two_level_threshold = 1; ``` ### Expected behavior _No response_ ### Error message and/or stacktrace _No response_ ### Additional context _No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE default.t_proj_test1 (id INT UNSIGNED, name VARCHAR(255), value DOUBLE, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO default.t_proj_test1 SELECT number, CONCAT('Name', number), number * 1.5, NOW() FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS number FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5) t1, (SELECT @rownum := 0) t2 LIMIT 10000) AS numbers;
CREATE TABLE default.t_proj_test2 (user_id INT UNSIGNED, score INT, timestamp DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);

INSERT INTO default.t_proj_test2 SELECT number, CASE WHEN number % 2 = 0 THEN number ELSE NULL END, CURRENT_DATE FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS number FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5) t1, (SELECT @rownum := 0) t2 LIMIT 5000) AS numbers;
SELECT user_id, SUM(score) AS total_score FROM default.t_proj_test2 GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_score DESC;
key_bug_features: Temporary data size statistic only increases, never decreases.
